untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (flag formation, downward slope, flag duration ~35 days, prior 95% rise, ~22% decline within flag) requires structural price pattern analysis not available in standard indicator set. Flag detection needs historical price bar evaluation, linear regression slope calculation, and multi-bar pattern matching which are not supported by the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture intent with price momentum requirement (95%+ prior rise approximated), receding volume condition (vol_ratio_20 < 1.0), and flag duration via hold_days_max=35. Exit uses price closing below 20-day MA as simple reversal. However, the core flag pattern detection—slope direction, visual consolidation, duration measurement, and price decline percentage within the flag—cannot be adequately expressed with allowed indicators and requires untranslatable=true.
